title: Service Technician  (Automatic Doors) (0580)
description:
• Basic Salary: $2,000 to $2,500 + OT
  • 5 days - 8.30am to 5.30pm / 5.5 days - Sat 8.30am - 1230am
  • Office Location: Ubi / Work Location: Island wide

Responsibilities

Field Service Operations:

  • Carry out schedule and retrofits automatic door parts; mechanical, electrical and electronic
  • Troubleshoot and conduct site check on the automatic entrance and propose parts recommendations for user consideration
  • Provide site report to client for the purpose of completion of works,
  • Testing/commissioning. Decommissioning and conduct risk assessment of all automatic entrance related system and products

Others:

  • Propose upgrades of automatic door entrances as well as providing feasible solutions to clients existing door entrances
  • Keeping assigned service vehicle in good road worthy condition and to upkeep vehicles cleanliness and hygiene at all times
  • Keep updated on product information and technical know-how for our products and competitor’s product
  • Maintaining all tools and equipment provided in a good working condition and to exchange timely when tools/equipment provided are found damaged or reasonably wear and tear observed
  • Any Other duties assign by the management or your immediate superior

Requirements

  • Valid Class 3 Singapore Driving License
  • Relevant experience in related mechanical/electrical roles


The Supreme HR Advisory Pte. Ltd || 14C7279

Chua Jie Ying (Cai Jie Ying), Evelynn || EA Personnel License R24120580
